---
title: "EDA"
author: "Hayden and George"
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---


```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(skimr)

df = read_csv("Xerces Site Counts by County.csv", n_max = 387)
view(df)

summary(df)
```

Total counts over time

```{r}
df_long = pivot_longer(df, 
                       cols = !c('SITE ID','SITE NAME','COUNTY or REGION'),
                       names_to = 'time_period',
                       values_to = 'count')

df_long = df_long %>% mutate(
    time_period = factor(time_period, levels = tail(names(df), -3))
  )

# site_count_years_group = site_count_years %>% 
#   mutate(
#     time_period = factor(time_period, levels = tail(names(df), -3))
#   ) %>% 
#   drop_na() %>% 
#   group_by(time_period) %>% 
#   summarize(total_counts = sum(count))
```

```{r}
# site_count_years %>% 
#   ggplot(aes(x=time_period, y=total_counts)) +
#     geom_col() +
#     coord_flip() +
#     theme_classic()

df_long %>% 
  drop_na() %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x=time_period, y=count, hue='COUNTY or REGION')) +
    geom_point() +
    geom_line() +
    theme_classic()
```
